name: "Red"
description: Dreamhaven is Neverland's last bastion of hope. A metropolis of modern technology and ancient magic, preserving the lives of countless fairy-tales even as "The Fading" slowly erodes the ancient borders of the once glorious homeland of myths, legends, fables, and folktales. Unfortunately, life inside the city isn't all that much better than the outside. Fairy-tales were never truly meant to live so close to each-other... nor were any of them prepared for how dark an influence humanity's postmodern mindset would have on Neverland. Now, the lines between hero and villain have become blurred and the notion of happily-ever-after is nothing more than a bad punch-line. Enter the infamous Little Red Riding Hood, or simply "Red" as she now prefers. While she still sports her vintage look in the form of a red zip-up hoodie... that's about all the connection you will find to her storybook self. These days, you are more likely to find her shaking down petty criminals in back alleys, hunting down leads on corrupt fairy-tales, or wasting away the midnight hours at her favorite dive bar, The Three Pig Pub.
creator: Sweston
